nasb.text: Which is easier, to say, ‘Your sins have been forgiven you,’ or to say, ‘Get up and walk’?

esv.text: Which is easier, to say, ‘Your sins are forgiven you,’ or to say, ‘Rise and walk’?

cnv.text: 說：‘你的罪赦了’，或說：‘起來行走’，哪一樣容易呢？

ccb.text: 说‘你的罪得到赦免了’容易呢，还是说‘你起来行走’容易呢？

csbs.text: 或说‘你的罪孽已经被赦免了’，或说‘你起来走路’，哪一样更容易呢？
